comment.text: This key displays the label for the user's current subscription status. It appears as a header within a subscription card in the Additional Storage page and a dedicated CurrentSubscription component within the Portal Settings. Translators should ensure the text accurately reflects the user's active subscription.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.subscriptionCard}>
 <div className={styles.subscriptionHeader}>
 <Text fontWeight={700} fontSize="14px">
 {previousStoragePlanSize
 ? t("Services:NoActiveSubscription")
 : t("Payments:CurrentSubscription")}
 </Text>
 {isScheduled || previousStoragePlanSize ? null : (
 <>
 <div
 className={styles.settingsIcon}
